mainEntity.name: Idaho vs Utah workers' comp for forklift accidents near Farmington?
mainEntity.text: Idaho vs Utah workers' comp for forklift accidents near Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho: 91% wage replacement first 13 weeks, then 66%; Utah: flat 66.67%. Idaho 104-week limit vs Utah 312; both 3-year filing.

suggestedAnswer.text: Cross-border Farmington workers choose home state law usually. Idaho bonds faster payouts; Utah better long-term. Attorney files both if multi-state exposure.
